scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @neobee/shared && npm run dev --workspace @neobee/server & npm run dev --workspace @neobee/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @neobee/shared && npm run dev --workspace @neobee/server
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @neobee/shared && npm run dev --workspace @neobee/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @neobee/shared && npm run build --workspace @neobee/server && npm run build --workspace @neobee/web
